name: S-11 (SS-116)
events: 5 Jun 1943 USS S-11 departed Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for Trinidad.
12 Jun 1943 USS S-11 arrived at Trinidad from Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
10 Jun 1944 USS S-11 (T/Cdr. F.M. Smith, USN) and USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR).

11 Jun 1944 USS S-11 (T/Cdr. F.M. Smith, USN) and USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS SC 662 (?) and USS SC-682 (Lt.(jg) G.E. Hoyt, USNR).

12 Jun 1944 USS S-11 (T/Cdr. F.M. Smith, USN) and USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS SC 662 (?) and USS SC-682 (Lt.(jg) G.E. Hoyt, USNR).

13 Jun 1944 USS S-11 (T/Cdr. F.M. Smith, USN) and USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS SC 662 (?) and USS SC-682 (Lt.(jg) G.E. Hoyt, USNR).
21 Oct 1944 USS S-11 departed Trinidad for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
26 Oct 1944 USS S-11 arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from Trinidad.
10 Jan 1945 USS S-11 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for the Panama Canal Zone.
13 Jan 1945 USS S-11 arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
8 Feb 1945 USS S-11 departed the Panama Canal Zone for New London, Connecticut via Key West, Florida.
15 Feb 1945 USS S-11 darrived at Key West, Florida en-route to New London, Connecticut.
16 Feb 1945 USS S-11 departed Key West, Florida for New London, Connecticut.
24 Feb 1945 USS S-11 arrived at New London, Connecticut.
27 Mar 1945 USS S-11 departed New London, Connecticut for decommissioning at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
28 Mar 1945 USS S-11 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard for decommissioning.
